0.title: Button to filter videos that were already seen
0.description: When we display all the videos of a channel, it would be nice to have a button that allows filtering to display only the videos that we haven't seen yet.

1.title: Splitting the videos and subs pages into two separate pages
1.description:
At the moment videomiam is just a single massive page, with all the code and scripts in a single page. 
I need to split this into several pages/script to make it easier to maintain

2.title: Add a new page for displaying a list of anime
2.description: Prepare a new page that can display a list of animes. The page can be mostly empty for now

3.title: Update the database schema to register animes
3.description:
Add a new table in the database schema to register Animes. Here are some of the fields necessary in this table: 
- id
- malId (MyAnimeList)
- Title
- Status (Completed, In progress...)
- Number of episodes
- Related Animes (prequels, sequels...)
- imageURL
- malURL
- synopsis
- genres
